text: case_load_and_capacity - Nord-Kivu CTE isolation occupancy reached 138.8% (saturation in Butembo, Kalunguta, Masereka, Musienene) and Ituri stood at 90.9%, against an estimated gap of about 20 isolation centers. - Response: Accelerate CTE construction/expansion and deploy additional temporary isolation structures.
public_note: Reviewed derived narrative from the INSP SitRep promotion; page-11 contact details are intentionally excluded; source redistribution terms require INSP attribution and confirmation before external republication.

text: contact_followup_gap - Contact follow-up reached 87.1% versus the 95% target (a 7.9 pp gap). - Response: Train, deploy, and motivate community relays (RECO) with reinforced supervision.
public_note: Reviewed derived narrative from the INSP SitRep promotion; page-11 contact details are intentionally excluded; source redistribution terms require INSP attribution and confirmation before external republication.

text: unlocalized_confirmed_cases - Seventeen Ituri confirmed cases remain not yet precisely ventilated by health zone. - Response: Conduct data reconciliation, duplicate cleanup, field verification, and reclassification.
public_note: Reviewed derived narrative from the INSP SitRep promotion; page-11 contact details are intentionally excluded; source redistribution terms require INSP attribution and confirmation before external republication.

text: weak_alert_reporting - Weak alert reporting in some affected health zones risks undetected, silent transmission. - Response: Reinforce community-based surveillance and rapid alert investigation.
public_note: Reviewed derived narrative from the INSP SitRep promotion; page-11 contact details are intentionally excluded; source redistribution terms require INSP attribution and confirmation before external republication.

text: health_worker_infections - The SitRep44 challenge table reports 78 health-worker infections and 18 deaths (CFR 23.1%). - Response: Reinforce IPC/WASH supplies (PPE, chlorine), supervision, and training.
public_note: Reviewed derived narrative from the INSP SitRep promotion; page-11 contact details are intentionally excluded; source redistribution terms require INSP attribution and confirmation before external republication.

text: lab_backlog - Nord-Kivu carries a laboratory sample backlog (16 under analysis) and late diagnosis amid a 54.7% provincial CFR. - Response: Deploy a laboratory catch-up plan and reinforce diagnostic capacity.
public_note: Reviewed derived narrative from the INSP SitRep promotion; page-11 contact details are intentionally excluded; source redistribution terms require INSP attribution and confirmation before external republication.

text: financial_resource_gap - A financial-resource gap of about USD 20 million limits implementation across all response pillars. - Response: Urgent resource mobilization and partner advocacy.

text: insecurity_access - Insecurity and limited access (CODECO, ADF) restrict operations in high-risk zones. - Response: Strengthen security coordination and humanitarian access.
